scope_note: Reference ledger only; priority can change based on fresh evidence.

commits.title: phase3d: make context widening knobs configurable
behavior_delta: Context widening moved from hardcoded constants to runtime config knobs.
Config merge now clamps/coerces widening params and normalizes context-risk weights.
rails_cs2 emits active widening params in debug for auditability.

tests_evidence.command: python3 -m pytest -q tests/unit/test_config_context_widening_knobs.py tests/unit/test_rails_cs2_context_widening.py tests/unit/test_rails_cs2_basic.py tests/unit/test_rails_input_contract.py tests/unit/test_rails_carryover_scenarios.py tests/unit/test_compute_slice1.py tests/unit/test_resolve_micro_adj.py

risks_reduced: Reduces calibration friction by exposing widening controls without code edits.
Prevents unstable config updates via bounded coercion.

commits.title: stage1: add contract diagnostics semantic validity metrics
behavior_delta: Replay assessment now computes semantic valid/invalid/null counts and rates per contract-diagnostics key.
Schema enforces semantic metric fields as required output.

tests_evidence.command: python3 -c "import asyncio; from tools.replay_verification_assess import run_assessment; s=asyncio.run(run_assessment('tools/fixtures/raw_replay_sample.jsonl')); print('semantic_keys', len(s['contract_diagnostics_semantic_required_keys']))"

risks_reduced: Closes presence-only observability gap with per-key semantic quality accounting.

commits.title: stage1: add postplant timer coverage diagnostics
behavior_delta: Replay summary now reports planted-bomb and post-plant timer coverage counters.
Dedicated post-plant fixture added to assert deterministic planted+timer diagnostics coverage.
risks_reduced: Makes planted-bomb timer-state coverage measurable and regressions detectable.

commits.title: stage1: add seeded synthetic replay generator harness
behavior_delta: Introduces deterministic synthetic raw replay generation for stress/simulation coverage.
Generated replays encode alive trajectories, economy regimes, planted countdown, near-zero timer pressure, and carryover regime swings.
risks_reduced: Creates a reproducible base for Bible-required simulation/stress suites.

primary_outcomes: Context widening is configurable and bounded.
Replay diagnostics now include semantic quality and post-plant timer coverage metrics.
Synthetic replay generation harness exists with deterministic tests.
known_remaining_gaps: Policy-driven simulation layer (execute/retake/clutch style trajectories) is not yet implemented.
Broader simulation/stress suite integration into canonical test workflow remains pending.
